시편 81:1.content: Sing aloud to God, our strength! Make a joyful shout to the God of Jacob!

시편 81:2.content: Raise a song, and bring here the tambourine, the pleasant lyre with the harp.

시편 81:3.content: Blow the trumpet at the New Moon, at the full moon, on our feast day.

시편 81:4.content: For it is a statute for Israel, an ordinance of the God of Jacob.

시편 81:5.content: He appointed it in Joseph for a covenant, when he went out over the land of Egypt, I heard a language that I didn’t know.

시편 81:6.content: “I removed his shoulder from the burden. His hands were freed from the basket.

시편 81:7.content: You called in trouble, and I delivered you. I answered you in the secret place of thunder. I tested you at the waters of Meribah.”

시편 81:8.content: “Hear, my people, and I will testify to you, Israel, if you would listen to me!

시편 81:9.content: There shall be no strange god in you, neither shall you worship any foreign god.

시편 81:10.content: I am Yahweh, your God, who brought you up out of the land of Egypt. Open your mouth wide, and I will fill it.

시편 81:11.content: But my people didn’t listen to my voice. Israel desired none of me.

시편 81:12.content: So I let them go after the stubbornness of their hearts, that they might walk in their own counsels.

시편 81:13.content: Oh that my people would listen to me, that Israel would walk in my ways!

시편 81:14.content: I would soon subdue their enemies, and turn my hand against their adversaries.

시편 81:15.content: The haters of Yahweh would cringe before him, and their punishment would last forever.

시편 81:16.content: But he would have also fed them with the finest of the wheat. I will satisfy you with honey out of the rock.”
